creator: pauls@ieng.com
text:
when you install the majordomo port, it chowns a number of things to
the majordom user that it shouldn't, including /usr/local/man,
/usr/local/man/man1, /usr/local/man/man8, and all the man page files
it installs.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/mail/majordomo ; make install
